description: Consolidate 40 top-level CLI commands into 8 groups with progressive disclosure. Old commands become deprecation aliases.

phases.description: New command that examines project state and takes the best next action.
phases.name: hex go — autonomous next action

tasks.description: New go.rs in commands/. Checks: stale binary → rebuild, pending workplan → suggest execute, failing tests → show failures, stale worktrees → suggest cleanup, nothing to do → say so. Wire into main.rs.
tasks.name: Implement hex go command

phases.description: Move trust, taste, inference, enforce, secrets under hex config subcommand.
phases.name: Group config commands under hex config

tasks.description: New config.rs that re-exports trust, taste, inference, enforce, secrets as subcommands. Wire into main.rs as Commands::Config. Keep old top-level commands as hidden aliases that print deprecation notice and delegate.
tasks.name: Create hex config parent command with subcommands

phases.description: Move analyze, validate, test, ci, worktree, init, new, report under hex dev.
phases.name: Group dev commands under hex dev

tasks.description: Update dev.rs to add subcommands for analyze, validate, test, ci, worktree. These delegate to the existing command modules. Keep old top-level commands as hidden aliases.
tasks.name: Expand hex dev to absorb analyze, validate, test, ci, worktree

phases.description: Move steer, pause, decide under hex override.
phases.name: Group override commands

tasks.description: override_cmd.rs already exists as the emergency override. Expand it or create a new parent that includes steer, pause, and decide as subcommands. Wire into main.rs.
tasks.name: Create hex override parent with steer, pause, decide subcommands

phases.description: Old top-level commands print deprecation notice and delegate. Update help text.
phases.name: Deprecation aliases + help hierarchy

tasks.description: For each moved command (trust, taste, inference, enforce, secrets, analyze, validate, test, ci, worktree, steer, pause, decide): keep the Commands enum variant but mark #[command(hide = true)] and print deprecation notice before delegating. e.g. 'hex trust is now hex config trust — redirecting...'
tasks.name: Add deprecation notices to old top-level commands
